positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic fox leaping over a crescent moon and intertwined wildflowers. The fox has a sleek, confident silhouette, rendered in bold black ink lines with bursts of vibrant emerald and sapphire blue accents. The overall composition is circular and highly symmetrical, perfect for a centered print on apparel. Use a woodcut and linocut print aesthetic, featuring strong, defined contrast between the solid black areas and the clean white negative space. The background should be clean and uncluttered, allowing the subject to pop. Flat graphic design, vector art quality, high contrast, decorative print, tattoo style.
